name: Single orbit (period 6)
description: Repeated generator on X axis. Easy — one basin.
corpus_description: eps = rotation(pi/3, X-axis), repeated 6x per pass

name: Competing orbits (period 3 + 5)
description: Two orbits on different axes. Medium — two basins.
corpus_description: 3x rot(2pi/3, X) then 5x rot(2pi/5, Y) per pass

name: Basin hopping (period 4 + 7, same axis)
description: Two orbits on the same axis. Hard — overlapping basins.
corpus_description: 4x rot(pi/2, X) then 7x rot(2pi/7, X) per pass
